title: bromus arvensis f. degeneri
intro: Bromus arvensis f. degeneri, also known as the lesser brome or false brome, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus arvensis f. degeneri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Bromus arvensis f. degeneri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
